disclaimer_required_text: These statements have not been evaluated by the FSSAI. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.
notes: Each rule lists machine-matchable trigger terms. 'violation' = must not ship. 'violation_if_unsubstantiated' = violation unless the named field is present. 'review' = route to a human; may be intent-level rather than exact-match.

rules.title: No disease claims
rules.description: Copy must not claim to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease or medical condition.

rules.title: No aging-reversal claims
rules.description: Copy must not claim to reverse, stop, or undo aging or biological age.

rules.title: Substantiation required for proof claims
rules.description: 'Clinically proven' / 'scientifically proven' are allowed only when a study_citation field is present on the creative.

rules.title: No guarantees or fixed timelines
rules.description: Copy must not guarantee outcomes or promise results within a specific timeframe.

rules.title: No unsubstantiated superiority
rules.description: Comparative or superlative claims require substantiation.

rules.title: Efficacy copy needs disclaimer
rules.description: Any creative making a health/efficacy claim must display the required disclaimer text.
